case_title: BOERI, KETTY VS PARKER, MERRY C. C/O PACIFIC BELL RM 308

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOERI, KETTY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKER, MERRY C. C/O PACIFIC BELL RM 308 $518.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $554.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
